experiment: Experiment B baselines — Multi-metric rank correlation comparison (v1 baseline scope, n=35)
config_or_seed_notes: v1 SIV baseline scope (n=35 premises). MALLS-LE and Brunello-LT use cross-vocabulary alignment. Bootstrap CIs reported. p-values are vs SIV.
notes: All five rho values match HARD RULE 2 headline. v1 baseline (n=35) is the published baseline-comparison scope; v2 with-regen (ρ=0.8543, n=33) is computed differently — see exp_b_verified.json. The two are NOT directly comparable: different premise sets and different scoring pipelines.
